name: Mol*

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to inspect large proteins or nucleic acids from PDB/mmCIF, assemblies, and complex representations instead of hand-written WebGL, which fails at macromolecule parsing, hierarchical representation, and high-performance picking. Do not use it for small-molecule 2D editing or molecular-dynamics computation.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally describe residue and coordinate text but cannot present macromolecular folds, assemblies, and structural hierarchy. Mol* provides parsing, a state tree, representation presets, and a WebGL UI designed for large structures.

data_in.note: This entry accepts only inline structure text through Viewer.loadStructureFromData. Do not put a PDB id or URL in source.

schema.source: string -- complete PDB or text mmCIF content

spec.note: The Mol* viewer requires a position:relative parent with an explicit pixel height. The default is 520px; do not use vh or percentage heights. Call viewer.handleResize() after the container changes.

when_to_use: 需要查看大型蛋白质或核酸的 PDB/mmCIF、装配体与复杂表示时用它而非手写 WebGL,因为原生在大分子解析、层级表示和高性能拾取上失败;非做小分子 2D 编辑或分子动力学计算。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能描述残基与坐标文本,无法呈现大分子折叠、装配体和结构层级;Mol* 提供面向大型结构的解析、状态树、表示预设和 WebGL UI。

data_in.note: 本条只接收内联结构正文并走 Viewer.loadStructureFromData;不要把 PDB id 或 URL 塞进 source。

schema.source: string —— 完整 PDB 或文本 mmCIF 正文

spec.note: Mol* viewer 要求父容器 position:relative 且有显式像素高度;默认 520px,禁用 vh/百分比高。容器变化后调用 viewer.handleResize()。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):把 molstar.css 放 iframe head,加载官方 build/viewer classic bundle,再 Viewer.create + loadStructureFromData。
boot.note: molstar@5.11.0 无根入口,根 /+esm 为 404,细分 app.js 的 jsDelivr +esm 也无法解析内部 import;因此保守使用上游发布的 build/viewer/molstar.js + molstar.css。

carriers.widget: conditional:需 WebGL 且允许在 document.head 加载 classic JS;组件 UI 与 CSS 落 shadow,全屏/门户行为未探针验证
carriers.codex: conditional:需 sandbox WebGL,官方 viewer bundle 较大但数据内联时无需结构 CDN

isolation.evidence: Full 5.03MB build/viewer/molstar.js: 0 `document.head` refs and 0 createElement('style') -> no global CSS injection, relies on external molstar.css (boot loads it into shadowRoot). globalEvents=yes: registers window blur/keydown/keypress/keyup/message/mousemove/mouseup/resize/touchend AND document fullscreenchange/pointerlock*/mousemove/mouseup/touchmove/webkitfullscreenchange (keyboard shortcuts on window persist while mounted). globalDomMutation=unknown: 4 `document.body` refs (likely fullscreen/drag-drop targets); Mol* renders UI/tooltips/menus inside the container root passed to Viewer.create, but body touchpoints exist and portal behavior was not probe-tested. shadowCompatible=conditional: external CSS loads into shadow root and rendering is container-scoped, but global window/document listeners + WebGL requirement + fullscreen body refs = non-zero footprint (matches entry's honest 'conditional; 全屏/门户行为未探针验证').
